references.text: Beusekom-Osinga, RJ van. 1977. Crypteroniaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 8: 187-204

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 14 September 2024

species.citation: (Planch.) Planch. ex Endl. , Gen. Pl. Suppl. (Endlicher) 4 (1848) 39 ; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 91; S.Vidal, Phan. Cuming. Philip. (1885) 20; Rev. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 138; Merrill, PJS 1(Suppl.) (1906) 102; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 139; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 196; ≡ Henslowia cumingii Planch. , London J. Bot. 4 (1845) 478. = Crypteronia laxa Elmer ex Merr. , EPFP 3 (1923) 140, nom. inval., in obs., pro syn.
species.distribution: Borneo, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi. CAMIGUIN, DINAGAT (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Apayao (photos), Aurora, Bataan, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, SAMAR.
species.notes: In primary and secondary forests, on ridges, slopes and along riverbanks. 50m (photos) to 1200(-1800)m.

species.citation: Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826-1827) 1151 ; Merrill, PJS 1(Suppl.) (1906) 102; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 140; Beus.-Osinga, Blumea 22 (1975) 259; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 8 (1977) 194. = Crypteronia glabra (Wall.) Planch. ex Endl. , Gen. Pl. Suppl. (Endlicher) 4 (1848) 39 ; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 91; S.Vidal, Sinopsis Atlas (1883) 27; Phan. Cuming. Philip. (1885) 48; Rev. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 138; ≡ Henslowia glabra Wall. , Pl. Asiat. Rar. 3 (1831-1832) 14 ; Cat. (1831-32) no. 4903. = Quilamum luteum Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 851 ; Fl. Filip. ed. 2, 1 (1845) 136; Fl. Filip. ed. 3, 1 (1877) 254. = Crypteronia pubescens (Wall.) Planch. ex Endl. , Gen. Pl. Suppl. (Endlicher) 4 (1848) 39 ; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 91; ≡ Henslowia pubescens Wall. , Pl. Asiat. Rar. 3 (1831-1832) 14 ; Cat. (1831-32) no. 4904. = Crypteronia leptostachys (Planch.) Endl. , Gen. Pl. Suppl. (Endlicher) 4 (1848) 39 ; S.Vidal, Phan. Cuming. Philip. (1885) 53; Rev. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 139; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 140; ≡ Henslowia leptostachys Planch. , London J. Bot. 4 (1845) 478; Type: Cuming 1464. var. paniculata. Distribution: Andaman Isls, Bangladesh, Borneo, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Philippines, Sumatra. LUZON: Abra, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines, La Union, Mountain Province, Pangasinan, Sorsogon, Zambales, NEGROS, PALAWAN. Notes: In primary and secondary forests on hills and mountains up to 1700m. Reported from riverbanks, ridges, ravines and forest borders. 0-1700m. Native.
species.distribution: LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Pampanga, Pangasinan, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Tarlac, Zambales, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY (photos).
